autonomous_research_brief.name: Autonomous Research Brief
autonomous_research_brief.description: Performs deep research on a topic and produces a synthesized brief.

steps.description: Search the web for relevant information on the topic.
Summarize the search results into key takeaways.
Format the summary into a professional research brief.

executive_daily_briefing.name: Executive Daily Briefing
executive_daily_briefing.description: Aggregates calendar and emails into a concise morning briefing.

steps.description: Retrieve priority emails from the inbox.
Synthesize events and emails into a concise daily briefing.

strategic_opportunity_monitor.name: Strategic Opportunity Monitor
strategic_opportunity_monitor.description: Analyzes external events for strategic alignment and notifies the executive.

steps.description: Analyze the incoming external event payload.
Check the event analysis against the user's strategic goals.
Notify the executive of the high-alignment opportunity.

results.title: Quantum Computing in 2026: From Laboratory Curiosity to Practical ...
results.snippet: Quantum computing has been five years away for the past twenty years, or so the joke goes. But 2026 is proving to be the year when the technology begins to transition from laboratory curiosity to practical, if narrow, utility. With IBM, Google, and a growing roster of startups demonstrating results that classical computers cannot efficiently replicate, the question is no longer whether quantum ...

results.title: Quantum Computing Milestones 2025-2026: IBM, Google, IonQ, Quantinuum ...
results.snippet: The most significant quantum computing advances of 2025-2026: Google Willow, IBM Nighthawk, IonQ's quantum advantage result, Quantinuum's IPO filing, and what comes next.

results.title: 7 Quantum Computing Trends That Will Shape Every Industry In 2026 - Forbes
results.snippet: Quantum computing is entering a pivotal year as breakthroughs move from laboratory experiments to real business impact across AI, cybersecurity and industry applications.

results.title: Quantum Computing in 2026: From Lab to Reality | Zylos Research
results.snippet: Cloud Quantum Computing: IBM, AWS, Microsoft, and Google are rolling out pay-as-you-go access to quantum computing in 2026, democratizing access for research institutions and early adopters.

results.title: Quantum Computing in 2026: Trends Changing Every Industry
results.snippet: Quantum Computing in 2026 moves from research to real use. Top quantum computing trends 2026 shape industries, security, AI growth, and the future of quantum computing.
